summary: A Go-based monolithic CLI tool featuring an assertion runner and MCP handlers, currently undergoing heavy AI-assisted test generation and API renaming.
concerns: Proliferation of auto-generated extra test directories (0005-0025) cluttering the repository
Mixed staged, modified, and untracked files in git status indicating incomplete commit workflow
Heavy reliance on AI-generated tests may lead to brittle or redundant test coverage
Recent commits show churn around documentation and renaming (SmokeSig) suggesting unstable API surface
suggestions: Archive or ignore GOrchestra/glm-agents directories to reduce repository noise
Resolve current git state (stage untracked, commit or stash modified) before continuing
Consolidate overlapping extra tests into standard test files
Stabilize public API naming before expanding test coverage
